nasb.text: That first slaughter which Jonathan and his armor bearer made was about twenty men within about half a furrow in an acre of land.

esv.text: And that first strike, which Jonathan and his armor-bearer made, killed about twenty men within as it were half a furrow’s length in an acre of land.

cnv.text: 約拿單和替他拿武器的第一次殺敵，約殺死了二十人，都是在四分之一公頃的範圍內殺的。

ccb.text: 他们首次出击，杀了约二十个非利士人，尸首倒在半亩大小的地上。
